text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Oguri has a scrimmage during her afternoon class today, I
decide to eat lunch together with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next to me is a bag crammed full of bread and rice balls of all
assortments. How did she fit that all in one bag?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I got these at the school shop. This should be enough to get me up
and running.
choice_data_list: How many meals' worth of food even is this?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: One meal.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, almost one. I wouldn't be able to run on a full stomach, so I got
just enough to keep me energized.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I go to the cafeteria, I end up eating way too much, so it's
good to get lunch from the school shop every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap carefully spreads the contents of her massive bag around
her, chooses one particularly smushed bread, and begins to eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an instant, all the food she had brought with her has disappeared.
It's like her mouth is a black hole that vacuums anything resembling
food into a void.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That was delicious.
choice_data_list: Did you even chew any of your food?
Did you even chew any of your food?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Of course I did.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are three rules to eating. Thank the hands that made the food.
Eat respectfully. And make sure to chew, taste, and swallow. That's
what Tome taught me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The folks back home taught me everything important. To repay them,
I need to succeed here at this academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me... Tome used to always give me stuff to munch on.
The homemade rice balls were to die for.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They were perfectly round and wrapped in only the best-tasting nori.
Like a cannonball, but edible.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Each rice ball would be packed with a different filling too. Fish, meat,
veggies, you name it. They had it all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Every bite had just the right mix of rice and filling, no matter how I
ate it. Eating those rice balls was pure bliss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Even thinking about them makes my stomach growl. I guess I
didn't buy enough to fill me up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm... I could go back for some more, but... I don't know if I'd make it back on time...
choice_data_list:
If it's rice balls you're after, I have some right
here. Want one?

If it's rice balls you're after, I have some right
here. Want one?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really?! If it's okay with you...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess one more wouldn't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's eyes sparkle as I hand her the rice ball. She downs it
before I can even blink and looks at me expectantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, all three of the rice balls I brought for lunch have
disappeared into the void.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much for the food. You made these yourself, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They remind me of the rice balls Tome would give me. They do more
than just fill my stomach... It's like they warm my very soul...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do you have some kind of special technique?
choice_data_list: Not really. I just threw these together.
Not really. I just threw these together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No special technique, huh? Then there's gotta be some other secret
to your rice balls. I'd like to see how you make them if you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've missed the taste of home ever since coming here. I wanna make
these for myself, so... would you mind teaching me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, being around you reminds me of back home. It's very
relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad you're willing to be my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The nostalgic taste of the rice balls really hit the spot. I feel fully
recharged, both mentally and physically. I'm gonna ace that
scrimmage, just you wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap keeps to her word and comes in first place—with an
overwhelming lead over all the other participants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm glad she made the most of my rice balls...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I kinda wish she left at least one for me...
